title: "Before Charlie was assassinated....": Candace Owens dragged into online conspiracy storm involving Charlie Kirk, Erika Kirk and Dan Bilzerian
summary_full: Candace Owens is facing fresh online controversy after a viral social media post linked her to Dan Bilzerian while referencing Charlie Kirk, Erika Kirk and Ben Shapiro. The post made several unverified allegations and reignited debate around Owens’ past interactions with Bilzerian, including resurfaced comments about private text messages. While no evidence has supported the claims spreading online, the controversy has fuelled intense speculation, backlash and political infighting across social media platforms.
